location.address: The Colony Infinitum | Roxy Pacific & Macly Group, Jalan Dewan Sultan Sulaiman, Chow Kit, 50300 Kuala Lumpur, Federal Territory of Kuala Lumpur, Malasia
location.name: The Colony By Infinitum

properties.review_text_published:
Our stay unfortunately did not go as expected.

When we arrived late at night, the apartment was not fully prepared for four guests as booked — there was only one bed available and additional mattresses had to be brought later.

After going to sleep, we discovered several bed bugs in the bedroom mattress. We immediately informed the reception and staff came to spray chemicals and change the sheets. However, considering the situation and the hygiene concerns, we did not feel comfortable sleeping in the bedroom anymore.

As a result, all four of us ended up sleeping on additional mattresses placed on the living room floor, which made the night quite uncomfortable and left everyone feeling uneasy about the hygiene conditions.

The staff did try to respond during the night, but unfortunately the situation could not be properly resolved and we had to move to another accommodation the next day.

I hope the property addresses this issue seriously, as bed bugs are a significant hygiene problem and can greatly affect guests’ experience.

properties.review_text_published:
I recently worked with Joy George from the Rockhampton IPA office by Synergie, and I couldn't be happier with the experience. Joy was professional, approachable, and honest about the expectations of the work in the mines. It was provided a clear guidance throughout the process and went above and beyond to ensure a smooth experience.

I highly recommend Joy and the team for anyone seeking reliable and supportive recruitment services in Rockhampton.
